# CH Tech Solutions — llms.txt

> CH Tech Solutions is a done-for-you AI services agency, a division of CH Tech Ventures LLC. We help local businesses and SMBs in the Lafayette, Louisiana area implement AI automation, voice agents, and website optimization.

## Services

- **AI Employee Setup**: Custom AI agents that handle customer service, scheduling, and admin tasks 24/7.
- **AI Voice Agents**: Phone-answering AI that books appointments, answers FAQs, and never misses a call.
- **OpenClaw / NemoClaw Setup**: Personal AI assistants that manage your operations, content, and communications.
- **GHL Automation**: GoHighLevel pipeline and workflow automation for leads, follow-ups, and client management.
- **AI Website Optimization (GEO)**: Websites optimized for Google AND AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini).

## About

CH Tech Solutions is the implementation arm of CH Tech Ventures LLC. We build production-grade AI systems for businesses — tested, monitored, and built to run 24/7. Our team combines deep AI expertise with real-world operational discipline.

## Contact

- Website: https://chtechsolutions.vercel.app
- Book a strategy call: https://api.leadconnectorhq.com/widget/bookings/chelsea-ai-strategy-call

## Portfolio

- **GeauxFind**: AI-curated local discovery platform for Lafayette, Louisiana.
- **Cadegent**: AI-powered content operations platform.

## Location

Lafayette, Louisiana, USA
